beer.beer_description: Our house yeast and Clean Fusion process keep the profile sharp and focused, allowing mango, passionfruit, peach and bright citrus oils to shine with clarity and snap. It’s expressive, but controlled. Radiant, but refined.

items.checkin_comment: This is a delicious drop. Jeez she pours thick as with the most gorgeous colour. Stonefruit and some topical goodness on the nose. The palate was super smooth, literally just fruit fruit fruit. Stonefruit and sweet citrus fruit. No booze showing either.

items.badge_description: Congrats, you've unlocked the World Pint 2026: Australia badge! Keep checking in beers to score badges from the other 47 countries competing in the world's biggest football competition. Keep up to date on future badges by following us on social @untappd!

items.checkin_comment: Tropical fruit, citrusy, passionfruit, hazy, soft and juicy. One of the best.

items.checkin_comment: This has what the can says. Soft in body with explosive aromas. Big aromas of tropical & stonefruit. Palate is oily & resinous with mango, peach & citrus. Really enjoyable.

items.badge_description: You may not be able to see through the haze, but that juicy, hoppy goodness goes down smooth. What started as a trend is here to stay. That's 130 different beers with the style of IPA - New England / Hazy, Pale Ale - New England / Hazy, IPA - Milkshake, or Pale Ale - Milkshake. Try 5 more for Level 27!

Everyone loves fresh beer, but obviously not as much as you do. You went straight to the source. 

That's a beer at 30 different venues categorized as a Brewery, Cidery or Meadery. Visit 5 more for Level 7!

user.bio:
Japanese
I love West Coast IPA and Stout
I like barley sandwiches!  And basically every style of beer.
I will find you. And I will toast you....
I’m a originally a stout lover,but have learned to appreciate other styles of beer! ”Boys drink beer,men drink stout”
⚡️It’s really this simple…Beer is damn good, and brings good people together. ⚡️
Pub regular and real ale drinker
